# Linktree LinkApp SDK

> Official documentation for the Linktree LinkApp SDK

## Docs

- [linkapp add](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/add.md): Add components from the registry to your project
- [linkapp build](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/build.md): Create an optimized production build of your LinkApp
- [linkapp deploy](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/deploy.md): Deploy your LinkApp to Linktree
- [linkapp dev](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/dev.md): Start the development server with live preview and hot reloading
- [linkapp login](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/login.md): Authenticate with Linktree
- [linkapp logout](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/logout.md): Sign out of Linktree
- [linkapp test-url-match-rules](https://docs.linktr.ee/cli/test-url-match-rules.md): Validate url_match_rules.json against a URL
- [Configuration](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/configuration.md): Configure your LinkApp with linkapp.config.ts
- [Manifest Reference](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/configuration/manifest.md): Complete reference for LinkApp manifest configuration
- [Settings Configuration](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/configuration/settings.md): Build user-facing settings forms for your LinkApp
- [URL Matching](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/configuration/url-matching.md): Auto-suggest your LinkApp when users enter matching URLs
- [Visibility & Discovery](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/configuration/visibility.md): Control how users find and access your LinkApp
- [Deployment](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/deployment.md): Deploy your LinkApp to Linktree
- [Layouts](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/layouts.md): Learn how LinkApp layouts work and how to create them
- [Settings Element Reference](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings-reference.md): Complete reference for all LinkApp settings element types
- [Advanced Elements](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings/advanced.md): Arrays, integrations, conditional display, and specialized elements
- [Location Element](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings/location.md): Google Places location picker for collecting place data
- [Selection Elements](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings/selections.md): Select, radio, and checkbox elements for choosing options
- [Text Input Elements](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings/text-inputs.md): Text, textarea, URL, and number input elements
- [Toggle Elements](https://docs.linktr.ee/essentials/settings/toggles.md): Switch and link behavior elements for on/off controls
- [Installation](https://docs.linktr.ee/installation.md): Build custom LinkApps for Linktree in minutes
